test: echo '🧪 Devbox Environment Test Suite'
echo ''
echo '📦 Testing Devbox packages...'
command -v make >/dev/null && echo '✅ make available' || (echo '❌ make missing' && exit 1)
command -v pandoc >/dev/null && echo '✅ pandoc available' || (echo '❌ pandoc missing' && exit 1)
command -v xelatex >/dev/null && echo '✅ xelatex available' || (echo '❌ xelatex missing' && exit 1)
command -v python >/dev/null && echo '✅ python available' || (echo '❌ python missing' && exit 1)
command -v pdfinfo >/dev/null && echo '✅ pdfinfo available' || (echo '❌ pdfinfo missing' && exit 1)
echo ''
echo '🐍 Testing Python environment...'
python --version
pip list | grep -E '(click|pdf2image|Pillow|numpy)' || (echo '❌ Python packages missing' && exit 1)
echo '✅ Python environment ready'
echo ''
echo '📋 Testing Makefile syntax...'
make -n help >/dev/null && echo '✅ Makefile syntax valid' || (echo '❌ Makefile syntax error' && exit 1)
echo ''
echo '🔍 Testing Makefile dry runs...'
make -n validate >/dev/null && echo '✅ validate target ok' || (echo '❌ validate target error' && exit 1)
make -n check-overflow >/dev/null && echo '✅ check-overflow target ok' || (echo '❌ check-overflow target error' && exit 1)
make -n html >/dev/null && echo '✅ html target ok' || (echo '❌ html target error' && exit 1)
make -n pdf >/dev/null && echo '✅ pdf target ok' || (echo '❌ pdf target error' && exit 1)
echo ''
echo '📁 Testing file structure...'
[ -f Makefile ] && echo '✅ Makefile exists' || (echo '❌ Makefile missing' && exit 1)
[ -f metadata.yml ] && echo '✅ metadata.yml exists' || (echo '❌ metadata.yml missing' && exit 1)
[ -d chapters ] && echo '✅ chapters/ directory exists' || (echo '❌ chapters/ missing' && exit 1)
[ -d images ] && echo '✅ images/ directory exists' || (echo '❌ images/ missing' && exit 1)
[ -d templates ] && echo '✅ templates/ directory exists' || (echo '❌ templates/ missing' && exit 1)
echo ''
echo '📚 Testing content validation...'
make validate && echo '✅ Content validation passed' || (echo '❌ Content validation failed' && exit 1)
echo ''
echo '🎉 All devbox environment tests passed!'
test-quick: command -v make pandoc xelatex python >/dev/null && echo '✅ Core tools available' || (echo '❌ Missing tools' && exit 1)
make -n help >/dev/null && echo '✅ Makefile syntax ok' || (echo '❌ Makefile error' && exit 1)
make validate && echo '✅ Content valid' || (echo '❌ Content invalid' && exit 1)
